name: Baseball Lover's Sundae
recipeIngredient: 1 quart (4 cups) chocolate chip or vanilla ice cream
1 cup (8 cookies) broken cream-filled peanut butter-sandwich cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop the ice cream into a 1-quart bowl.
2. Freeze until firm, if desired.
3. Drizzle the fudge topping over the ice cream.
4. Sprinkle with broken cookies.
5. To serve, place the bowl in an adult-sized baseball glove and spoon into individual serving dishes.
Yield: 8 servings
